claims.text: Progress keeps being underestimated.
People keep predicting that progress will slow down.
Human brains really do not want to predict change.
Human brains are wired by millions of years of primate evolution to resist predicting change.
Progress will keep coming.
Recursive self-improvement (RSI) is here.
Nothing will stop recursive self-improvement (RSI).
Compute keeps increasing.
Algorithms keep getting more efficient.
Memory is being solved.
In-context learning is sample efficient.
Anthropic will potentially be about 60% of the economy.
The current timeline might be one of the best timelines that we could have planned for.
People have in fact planned for the current timeline.
The best people go to Anthropic.
The best people ask themselves where their talent and work will most increase the likelihood of a good AI future.
Anthropic hires based on who is really committed to ensuring a good AI future.
If governance holds, the current setup is close to the best setup we can ask for.
Malicious actors are repelled.
The path to a good AI future is visible.
The priority of a question q equals the sum over all i of the weight w_i multiplied by the score s_i(q).

theses.text: Recursive self-improvement is already underway and continued AI progress is unstoppable.
Anthropic is close to the best possible setup for ensuring a good AI future, which is why the best people work there.
